summary: Quote Engine Core Testing Complete - All features verified working. 18/18 backend tests pass. All UI flows working correctly.

minor.issue: 500 error due to datetime sorting issue (TypeError: '<' not supported between instances of 'str' and 'datetime.datetime')
minor.note: Not related to Quote Engine - existing bug in customer_notifications_routes.py line 90

seed_data_creation: Created test quotes during backend testing - all prefixed with KON-QT-*
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quote Engine Core fully implemented and tested. All CRUD operations work. Installment payment logic creates invoice splits correctly.

ADMIN_SALES_CRM_PAGE.details: Sales CRM page loads with 4 tabs: Leads, Quotes, Active Orders, Performance. All tabs functional.

ADMIN_QUOTE_BUILDER_MODAL.details: Quote Builder Modal opens from Leads tab. Has Line Items, Total Amount, Payment Type (Full/Installment), Deposit %, Notes, and 'Send immediately' checkbox.

QUOTE_CREATE_API.details: POST /api/quotes-engine/create works. Creates quote with status 'draft'. Supports payment_type 'full' or 'installment' with deposit_percent.

QUOTE_SEND_API.details: POST /api/quotes-engine/{id}/send works. Updates quote status to 'sent'. Creates notification for customer.

CUSTOMER_QUOTES_PAGE.details: Customer Quotes page (/dashboard/quotes) lists all quotes. Shows Accept/Reject buttons for pending/sent quotes. Shows 'Pay Invoice' for converted quotes.

CUSTOMER_ACCEPT_QUOTE.details: POST /api/customer/quotes/{id}/approve works. Creates invoice. For installment quotes, creates invoice_splits (deposit + balance).

CUSTOMER_REJECT_QUOTE.details: POST /api/customer/quotes/{id}/reject works. Updates quote status to 'rejected'. Stores rejection reason. Notifies sales rep.

CUSTOMER_INVOICES_PAGE.details: Customer Invoices page (/dashboard/invoices) shows invoices. Detail panel shows 'Installment Payment' info block with Deposit/Balance/Amount Due Now.

INVOICE_PAYMENT_PAGE.details: Invoice Payment page (/dashboard/invoices/{id}/pay) loads. Shows installment breakdown. Has 'Upload Payment Proof' button.

INVOICE_SPLITS_API.details: GET /api/customer/invoices/{id}/splits works. Returns deposit and balance splits with amounts and status.

E2E_FLOW.details: Full flow verified: Create quote -> Send -> Customer Accept -> Invoice with splits created -> Payment page shows installment info
